description: oh-my-claude-code-slim: orchestrator-gated hooks. UserPromptSubmit injects the scheduler phase reminder each turn; PostToolUse (Read|Write|Edit) re-injects it at most once per turn after direct file work; PreToolUse (Agent|Task) denies spawning anything but the five plugin specialists. All fire only when the active agent is the plugin orchestrator (default sessions and subagents are unaffected); OMCC_SLIM_DISABLE=1 silences everything.
